notes: TCGplayer Authentication Center study, 2,000+ packs opened (god packs excluded from the data), relayed by PokeBeach. Per-pack odds: double rare 1/5, ultra rare 1/21 and Mega Attack Rare 1/29 (modeled as mega-ex — 7 secret full-art Mega ex cards) in the rare slot; illustration rare 1/9, special illustration rare 1/70 (1.44%) and Mega Hyper Rare 1/540 (0.19%, modeled as hyper-rare) replacing the second reverse-holo slot. Special expansion: no 36-pack booster display, sold via ETB (9 packs), booster bundles (6 packs) and collections. Reverse filler approximated as a 50/50 common/uncommon split. packSize excludes the basic Energy and code card.
